description: All migrations must be additive. Destructive operations require explicit user approval.

rules.description: DROP TABLE, DROP COLUMN, DELETE FROM, TRUNCATE are forbidden in migration files without explicit approval
Migration file timestamps must be strictly ascending with no duplicates
rules.guidance: Glob supabase/migrations/*.sql, extract timestamps from filenames, verify strictly ascending order

rules.description: Migrations should add tables, columns, indexes, constraints — not alter or remove existing structures
rules.guidance: ALTER COLUMN type changes and RENAME operations require explicit approval. Only ADD COLUMN is safe by default.
